requirement_topic.en: Conformity, Import Inspection & In-Country Importer (Cambodia / ISC)
requirement_topic.zh: 合格评定、进口检验与在地进口商（柬埔寨／ISC）
requirement_topic.zht: 合格評定、進口檢驗與在地進口商（柬埔寨／ISC）

summary.en: Market access in Cambodia is built around an in-country importer of record and conformity/import inspection rather than a manufacturer self-declaration CE-style scheme. The Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) sets Cambodia Standards (CS) by adopting IEC/ASEAN standards and conducts conformity and import inspection for regulated products. A locally established importer typically handles registration, documentation, conformity assessment arrangements, and customs clearance. Goods generally enter through the deep-sea port of Sihanoukville or via Phnom Penh (river port and the inland/air gateway). Exporters should confirm with ISC and the importer whether refrigerators are on the regulated-product list, which CS standards apply, what test reports or certificates are accepted, and whether inspection occurs pre-shipment or at the border. There is no Cambodian equivalent of an EU Authorised Representative — the in-country importer fulfils the responsible-party role.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨的市场准入以在地进口商（进口记录方）及合格评定／进口检验为核心，而非制造商自我声明的CE式机制。柬埔寨标准局（ISC）通过采用IEC/东盟标准制定柬埔寨标准（CS），并对受监管产品执行合格评定与进口检验。在地设立的进口商通常负责登记、文件、合格评定安排及清关。货物一般经深水港西哈努克城（Sihanoukville）或经金边（Phnom Penh，河港及内陆／空运门户）入境。出口商应向ISC及进口商确认：冰箱是否列入受监管产品清单、适用哪些CS标准、接受何种检测报告或证书，以及检验是在装运前还是在口岸进行。柬埔寨没有欧盟授权代表的对应制度——由在地进口商承担责任方角色。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨的市場准入以在地進口商（進口記錄方）及合格評定／進口檢驗為核心，而非製造商自我聲明的CE式機制。柬埔寨標準局（ISC）通過採用IEC/東盟標準制定柬埔寨標準（CS），並對受監管產品執行合格評定與進口檢驗。在地設立的進口商通常負責登記、文件、合格評定安排及清關。貨物一般經深水港西哈努克城（Sihanoukville）或經金邊（Phnom Penh，河港及內陸／空運門戶）入境。出口商應向ISC及進口商確認：冰箱是否列入受監管產品清單、適用哪些CS標準、接受何種檢測報告或證書，以及檢驗是在裝運前還是在口岸進行。柬埔寨沒有歐盟授權代表的對應制度——由在地進口商承擔責任方角色。

standards_or_laws: Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) — Cambodia Standards (CS) setting; conformity and import inspection for regulated products
In-country importer of record — responsible party for registration, documentation, and customs clearance
Ports of entry — Sihanoukville (deep-sea) and Phnom Penh (river port / inland gateway)

summary.en: In China, household refrigerators are subject to China Compulsory Certification (CCC) administered by SAMR/CNCA, with conformity demonstrated by a CCC certificate based on GB 4706.13 (safety) and supporting GB standards, plus the China Energy Label registration. The CCC mark and certificate are the domestic gatekeepers for sale in China. These domestic CCC/CEL approvals are not recognised in Cambodia: there is no mutual recognition that lets a CCC certificate clear Cambodian import inspection automatically, and the responsible-party model differs — China relies on the CCC certificate holder/manufacturer, whereas Cambodia relies on the in-country importer of record for registration and clearance.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用冰箱须经中国强制性产品认证（CCC，由SAMR/CNCA管理），以基于GB 4706.13（安全）及配套GB标准的CCC证书证明合格，并附中国能效标识登记。CCC标志与证书是在华销售的国内准入关口。上述国内CCC/CEL批准在柬埔寨不被承认：不存在使CCC证书自动通过柬埔寨进口检验的互认，且责任方模式不同——中国依赖CCC证书持有人／制造商，而柬埔寨依赖在地进口商（进口记录方）进行登记与清关。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用冰箱須經中國強制性產品認證（CCC，由SAMR/CNCA管理），以基於GB 4706.13（安全）及配套GB標準的CCC證書證明合格，並附中國能效標識登記。CCC標誌與證書是在華銷售的國內准入關口。上述國內CCC/CEL批准在柬埔寨不被承認：不存在使CCC證書自動通過柬埔寨進口檢驗的互認，且責任方模式不同——中國依賴CCC證書持有人／製造商，而柬埔寨依賴在地進口商（進口記錄方）進行登記與清關。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — administered by SAMR/CNCA; CCC certificate based on GB 4706.13 and supporting GB standards
China Energy Label (CEL) registration — required for domestic sale in China

gap.en: The procedural model differs from China's CCC: (1) Cambodia requires an in-country importer of record to carry the responsible-party functions; there is no EU-style Authorised Representative and no manufacturer self-declaration mark; (2) Chinese CCC and CEL approvals are not automatically recognised — conformity must be demonstrated through ISC-administered conformity/import inspection against applicable CS standards; (3) the exact regulated-product status of refrigerators, the accepted test reports/certificates, and whether inspection is pre-shipment or at-border must be confirmed with ISC and the importer; (4) logistics planning should account for entry via Sihanoukville or Phnom Penh. Exporters should appoint or work through a competent Cambodian importer early.
gap.zh: 程序模式与中国CCC不同：（1）柬埔寨要求由在地进口商（进口记录方）承担责任方职能；没有欧盟式授权代表，也没有制造商自我声明标志；（2）中国CCC与CEL批准不被自动承认——须通过ISC管理的合格评定／进口检验依适用CS标准证明合格；（3）冰箱的具体受监管状态、接受的检测报告／证书，以及检验是在装运前还是在口岸，须向ISC及进口商确认；（4）物流规划应考虑经西哈努克城或金边入境。出口商应尽早委任或通过有资质的柬埔寨进口商运作。
gap.zht: 程序模式與中國CCC不同：（1）柬埔寨要求由在地進口商（進口記錄方）承擔責任方職能；沒有歐盟式授權代表，也沒有製造商自我聲明標誌；（2）中國CCC與CEL批准不被自動承認——須通過ISC管理的合格評定／進口檢驗依適用CS標準證明合格；（3）冰箱的具體受監管狀態、接受的檢測報告／證書，以及檢驗是在裝運前還是在口岸，須向ISC及進口商確認；（4）物流規劃應考慮經西哈努克城或金邊入境。出口商應盡早委任或通過有資質的柬埔寨進口商運作。

mandatory_status.target: An in-country importer of record is required; conformity/import inspection by ISC applies to regulated products. Refrigerator regulated-product status and accepted evidence to be confirmed with ISC. No EU-style Authorised Representative or self-declaration mark
mandatory_status.cn: CCC certification (mandatory) and China Energy Label registration are the domestic gatekeepers for sale in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cambodia's market-access model centres on an in-country importer of record plus ISC-administered conformity/import inspection, not a CE-style self-declaration. Chinese CCC and CEL approvals are not automatically recognised. Confirm with ISC whether refrigerators are regulated, which CS standards and test evidence are accepted, and whether inspection is pre-shipment or at-border. Plan entry via Sihanoukville or Phnom Penh and engage a competent Cambodian importer early.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨的市场准入模式以在地进口商（进口记录方）加ISC管理的合格评定／进口检验为核心，而非CE式自我声明。中国CCC与CEL批准不被自动承认。请向ISC确认冰箱是否受监管、接受哪些CS标准与检测证据，以及检验是在装运前还是口岸。规划经西哈努克城或金边入境，并尽早委任有资质的柬埔寨进口商。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨的市場准入模式以在地進口商（進口記錄方）加ISC管理的合格評定／進口檢驗為核心，而非CE式自我聲明。中國CCC與CEL批准不被自動承認。請向ISC確認冰箱是否受監管、接受哪些CS標準與檢測證據，以及檢驗是在裝運前還是口岸。規劃經西哈努克城或金邊入境，並盡早委任有資質的柬埔寨進口商。

requirement_topic.en: Absence of EU-Style Horizontal Regimes — RoHS / Battery / Outdoor-Noise (Cambodia)
requirement_topic.zh: 缺乏欧盟式横向制度——RoHS／电池／户外噪声（柬埔寨）
requirement_topic.zht: 缺乏歐盟式橫向制度——RoHS／電池／戶外噪聲（柬埔寨）

summary.en: Cambodia does not operate the EU-style horizontal regimes that apply to refrigerators in the EU. Plainly stated: there is no Cambodian equivalent of EU RoHS (restriction of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment), no EU-style battery directive/regulation regime governing portable batteries used in any electronic controls, and no outdoor-noise emission regime equivalent to the EU outdoor-noise directive. Consequently, the EU-style obligations around restricted-substance declarations, battery take-back/marking, and guaranteed sound-power-level marking do not apply as standalone legal requirements for placing a refrigerator on the Cambodian market. Some substance or environmental concerns may instead be touched on indirectly through adopted CS/IEC product-safety standards or general import rules, but there is no horizontal RoHS/battery/noise framework to comply with. Exporters should not spend effort building Cambodia-specific RoHS or battery-directive dossiers, while still meeting any applicable CS/IEC product-safety provisions.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨不实行欧盟对冰箱适用的欧盟式横向制度。直白地说：柬埔寨没有欧盟RoHS（电气电子设备有害物质限制）的对应制度，没有管辖电子控制中所用便携电池的欧盟式电池指令／法规制度，也没有等同于欧盟户外噪声指令的户外噪声排放制度。因此，围绕受限物质声明、电池回收／标识及保证声功率级标注的欧盟式义务，不作为冰箱投放柬埔寨市场的独立法律要求适用。某些物质或环境议题可能改为通过采用的CS/IEC产品安全标准或一般进口规则间接涉及，但不存在需要遵循的横向RoHS／电池／噪声框架。出口商不应耗费精力建立柬埔寨专属的RoHS或电池指令档案，同时仍应满足任何适用的CS/IEC产品安全条款。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨不實行歐盟對冰箱適用的歐盟式橫向制度。直白地說：柬埔寨沒有歐盟RoHS（電氣電子設備有害物質限制）的對應制度，沒有管轄電子控制中所用便攜電池的歐盟式電池指令／法規制度，也沒有等同於歐盟戶外噪聲指令的戶外噪聲排放制度。因此，圍繞受限物質聲明、電池回收／標識及保證聲功率級標註的歐盟式義務，不作為冰箱投放柬埔寨市場的獨立法律要求適用。某些物質或環境議題可能改為通過採用的CS/IEC產品安全標準或一般進口規則間接涉及，但不存在需要遵循的橫向RoHS／電池／噪聲框架。出口商不應耗費精力建立柬埔寨專屬的RoHS或電池指令檔案，同時仍應滿足任何適用的CS/IEC產品安全條款。

standards_or_laws: No Cambodian equivalent of EU RoHS (Directive 2011/65/EU) for electrical and electronic equipment
No EU-style battery directive/regulation regime (e.g. EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542) for embedded/portable batteries
No outdoor-noise emission regime equivalent to EU Directive 2000/14/EC
Substance/environmental aspects, if any, addressed indirectly via adopted CS/IEC product-safety standards and general import rules

summary.en: China does operate its own restricted-substance scheme — China RoHS (Administrative Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products), with GB/T 26572 limits and the marking/declaration requirements of the conformity assessment catalogue. China also has battery and recycling rules under broader environmental and EPR frameworks. These are Chinese domestic regimes; they are referenced here only to note that a manufacturer already holding China RoHS documentation has substance data on hand, but Cambodia imposes no corresponding horizontal RoHS/battery/noise obligation, so no Cambodia-specific equivalent filing exists to map onto.
summary.zh: 中国确有其自身的受限物质制度——中国RoHS（电器电子产品有害物质限制使用管理办法），含GB/T 26572限值及合格评定目录的标识／声明要求。中国在更广泛的环境与生产者责任延伸（EPR）框架下也有电池与回收规则。这些为中国国内制度；此处引用仅为说明：已持有中国RoHS文件的制造商手头已有物质数据，但柬埔寨不施加对应的横向RoHS／电池／噪声义务，故不存在可对应映射的柬埔寨专属申报。
summary.zht: 中國確有其自身的受限物質制度——中國RoHS（電器電子產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法），含GB/T 26572限值及合格評定目錄的標識／聲明要求。中國在更廣泛的環境與生產者責任延伸（EPR）框架下也有電池與回收規則。這些為中國國內制度；此處引用僅為說明：已持有中國RoHS文件的製造商手頭已有物質數據，但柬埔寨不施加對應的橫向RoHS／電池／噪聲義務，故不存在可對應映射的柬埔寨專屬申報。

standards_or_laws: China RoHS — Administrative Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products; GB/T 26572 substance limits
Chinese battery/recycling and EPR rules under broader environmental frameworks (domestic)

gap.en: This is a negative gap — Cambodia imposes fewer EU-style horizontal obligations than the EU, so several EU-only workstreams simply do not apply: (1) no Cambodian RoHS dossier, restricted-substance declaration, or RoHS mark is required for market placement; (2) no EU-style battery take-back, marking, or registration applies to any embedded battery in the refrigerator's controls; (3) no guaranteed sound-power-level marking under an outdoor-noise regime applies. The only carry-over is that existing China RoHS substance data may be retained for due diligence, but no Cambodia-specific filing maps onto it. Exporters should focus effort on CS/IEC product safety, energy, conformity/import inspection, and the importer — not on horizontal environmental dossiers that Cambodia does not require.
gap.zh: 这是一项负向差距——柬埔寨施加的欧盟式横向义务少于欧盟，故若干欧盟专属工作流根本不适用：（1）市场投放不要求柬埔寨RoHS档案、受限物质声明或RoHS标志；（2）冰箱控制中任何嵌入式电池均不适用欧盟式电池回收、标识或登记；（3）不适用户外噪声制度下的保证声功率级标注。唯一可沿用的是现有中国RoHS物质数据可留作尽职调查，但没有可对应映射的柬埔寨专属申报。出口商应将精力集中于CS/IEC产品安全、能效、合格评定／进口检验及进口商——而非柬埔寨不要求的横向环境档案。
gap.zht: 這是一項負向差距——柬埔寨施加的歐盟式橫向義務少於歐盟，故若干歐盟專屬工作流根本不適用：（1）市場投放不要求柬埔寨RoHS檔案、受限物質聲明或RoHS標誌；（2）冰箱控制中任何嵌入式電池均不適用歐盟式電池回收、標識或登記；（3）不適用戶外噪聲制度下的保證聲功率級標註。唯一可沿用的是現有中國RoHS物質數據可留作盡職調查，但沒有可對應映射的柬埔寨專屬申報。出口商應將精力集中於CS/IEC產品安全、能效、合格評定／進口檢驗及進口商——而非柬埔寨不要求的橫向環境檔案。

mandatory_status.target: Not applicable — Cambodia has no EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regime as a standalone market-placement requirement for refrigerators. Any substance/environmental aspects are addressed only indirectly via adopted CS/IEC product-safety standards or general import rules
mandatory_status.cn: China RoHS (substance restriction/marking) and domestic battery/recycling/EPR rules apply for the China market

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Plainly: Cambodia has no EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery-directive, or outdoor-noise regime applying to refrigerators, so those EU-only obligations do not apply as standalone Cambodian requirements. Existing China RoHS substance data can be kept for due diligence but maps onto no Cambodian filing. Direct compliance effort toward CS/IEC product safety, energy programmes, conformity/import inspection, and the in-country importer instead.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 直白地说：柬埔寨没有适用于冰箱的欧盟式横向RoHS、电池指令或户外噪声制度，故该类欧盟专属义务不作为独立的柬埔寨要求适用。现有中国RoHS物质数据可留作尽职调查，但无对应的柬埔寨申报。请将合规精力转向CS/IEC产品安全、能源计划、合格评定／进口检验及在地进口商。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 直白地說：柬埔寨沒有適用於冰箱的歐盟式橫向RoHS、電池指令或戶外噪聲制度，故該類歐盟專屬義務不作為獨立的柬埔寨要求適用。現有中國RoHS物質數據可留作盡職調查，但無對應的柬埔寨申報。請將合規精力轉向CS/IEC產品安全、能源計劃、合格評定／進口檢驗及在地進口商。
